mean_en: to have confidence in somebody; to believe that somebody is good, sincere, honest, etc.; to believe that something is true or correct or that you can rely on it
sentence: The man on the verge of falling put his trust in his two friends.
sentence_trans: 这个濒临坠落的人把他的信任寄托在他的两位朋友身上。
word_etyma: tru坚固，坚定 + st表名词  → （坚定地）相信  → trust信任
